title: ochthocosmus multiflorus
intro: Ochthocosmus multiflorus, also known as the Red Stinging Tree, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Ochthocosmus multiflorus include relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies in some parts of the world.
